risk_title: Project Implementation Suspended Due to Political Instability
risk_summary: The Afghanistan Resilience Trust Fund (ARTF) component was canceled and IDA grants remain suspended due to the extraordinary political situation in Afghanistan, preventing effective project implementation.
evidence_quote: The Afghanistan Resilience Trust Fund (ARTF) in the project was canceled based on the consideration that the project cannot be effectively implemented under the current extraordinary situation in Afghanistan. Undisbursed IDA grants under this project will remain suspended until a decision is made by the World Bank.

risk_title: Political and Governance Fragility Affecting Implementation
risk_summary: Political and governance risks remain rated as High at both approval and current assessment, indicating persistent governance fragility impacting project execution.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance [Risk Category Rating]: High [at Approval], High [Previous Rating], High [Current Rating]

risk_summary: Institutional capacity for implementation has worsened from Substantial at approval to Moderate currently, indicating declining government capacity to execute the project.
evidence_quote: Institutional Capacity for Implementation and Sustainability [Risk Category Rating]: Substantial [at Approval], Moderate [Previous Rating], Moderate [Current Rating]

risk_summary: The 'Other' risk category has escalated from Substantial at approval to High currently, suggesting emerging FCV-related implementation challenges beyond standard categories.
evidence_quote: Other [Risk Category Rating]: Substantial [at Approval], Substantial [Previous Rating], High [Current Rating]
